REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFFS LAURENCE LOCKEY, CATHY LOCKEY, RICHARD RILEY, JOANNE RILEY, DYLAN LOCKEY, SINCLAIR RILEY, ZACHARY WISE, AND KYLE LABARO'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST LAWRENCE CHOY PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE THE ORDER SETTING ASIDE THE DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PARTIES TO FILE A STIPULATION FOR THE COURT TO RETAIN JURISDICTION PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 PRIOR TO ANY DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ATTORNEYS FEES IS DENIED. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PROVIDES FOR COSTS AND FEES ASSOCIATED WITH COLLECTION OF THE MONIES DUE. THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PROVIDES EACH PARTY WILL BEAR HIS/HER OWN COSTS, EXPENSES, AND ATTORNEYS' FEES . . . INCURRED IN, OR ARISING OUT OF, OR IN ANY WAY CONNECTED WITH THE CIRCUMSTANCES AND DISPUTES WHICH ARE THE SUBJECT OF THIS AGREEMENT. THE PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM AND THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. (COUNSEL SUBMITS PROPOSED ORDER, PENDING) JUDGE: CHARLES F. Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiffs Laurence Lockey, Cathy Lockey, Richard Riley, Joanne Riley, Dylan Lockey, Sinclair Riley, Zackary Wise, And Kyle Labaro For Entry Of Judgment Against Lawrence Choy Pursuant To Ccp 664.6; Request For Attorneys Fees Against Defendant Lawrence Choy
Off Calendar May-03-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Laura Strasso of the law offices of Hooshmand Law Group (415-318-5709) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFFs LAURENCE LOCKEY, CATHY LOCKEY, RICHARD RILEY, JOANNE RILEY, DYLAN LOCKEY, SINCLAIR RILEY, ZACHARY WISE, and KYLE LABARO's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Against Lawrence Choy Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 is GRANTED. Plaintiff to prepare the Order setting aside the Dismissal. Plaintiff to prepare Order for Entry of Judgment. Parties to file a stipulation for the Court to retain jurisdiction pursuant to CCP 664.6 prior to any dismissal.

Plaintiff's request for Attorneys fees is DENIED. Stipulation for Entry of Judgment provides for costs and fees associated with collection of the monies due. The Settlement Agreement provides each party will bear his/her own costs, expenses, and attorneys' fees . . . incurred in, or arising out of, or in any way connected with the circumstances and disputes which are the subject of this agreement. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312. (counsel submits proposed order, pending)

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported

No other Appearance.

The Court calls the matter for the first time at 9:46 am and calls the related case CGC-14-542933. The Court informs the party it's concern re: non appearance of opposing side, a defendant, bankruptcy proceedings and consolidation being premature. Plaintiff reports she did not hear from Opposing side. The Court decides to pass the matter. The matter is recalled at 11:19 am. There is no Appearance by the Opposing side. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
